risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) financing for the project was canceled, and IDA grant disbursements remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation Capacity
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'High' throughout the project lifecycle, directly constraining the implementing agency's (Ministry of Urban Development and Land) ability to execute project activities and maintain institutional continuity.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints Linked to Governance Fragility
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability is rated 'High' risk, reflecting the government's limited ability to sustain land administration systems and operations under the current governance environment.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Deteriorating Macroeconomic Conditions Affecting Project Viability
risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk has escalated from 'Substantial' at approval to 'High' in the current rating, indicating severe economic instability in Afghanistan that undermines project implementation and sustainability prospects.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Macroeconomic - Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High
